themes.exampleQuote: A perfect speakeasy vibe with the best cocktails I've had in Pittsburgh.
The drink pictured is the 'absinthe makes the heart grow fonder' and is a superb riff on a Sazerac/Manhattan/old fashioned.
Alicia was one of the best bartenders I've had — definitely deserves the bar manager position.
After we ordered a third round of drinks, we were informed that we had to leave because there is a 90-minute time limit.
I have tried to get in a few times but it is always super packed.

notable_quote: I will be making the drive from Cleveland JUST for this bar in the near future.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers keep coming back to the moody atmosphere, specific named bartenders, and cocktails inventive enough to be described in full — the one friction point is a 90-minute seating limit that surfaces with no warning until the check drops.
quarter_narrative: Twenty-eight creators filmed Commerce Bar this quarter. The bar filmed almost none of it back. That gap — 1.6 million TikTok plays generated entirely by other people's phones, while the bar's own Instagram posted once in 30 days and has no TikTok presence at all — is the defining story of Commerce Bar's Spring 2026. @andrewgardone's single video, captioned 'Best place in Pittsburgh it's slept on,' pulled 443,400 plays and did more for the bar's visibility than anything the bar published itself. Meanwhile, Hidden Harbor leads the Pittsburgh Bars family on social momentum, which is exactly the axis Commerce Bar is leaving on the table. The rank holds at #2 for now, but the ceiling is creator-driven and the bar isn't in the room when it happens.
tldr_read: Strong creator coverage and loyal reviews, near-invisible on its own social channels — Neighborhood Staples, #2 in Pittsburgh Bars.
tldr_meaning: The gap between 1.6 million earned TikTok plays and a single Instagram post in 30 days is the widest divergence in this family, and it's what separates Commerce Bar from the top spot.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: 1.6 Million TikTok Plays, One Instagram Post, and a Bar That Isn't Filming Back.

playbook.headline: Claim a TikTok presence before someone else does
playbook.action: 28 creators filmed here this quarter with zero reciprocal posts — open a business TikTok and repost the top-performing creator videos within this issue cycle.

playbook.headline: Fix the Google listing's missing contact floor
playbook.action: Commerce Bar has no website and no phone number on Google — two missing fields that break the path from a TikTok view to a reservation attempt.

playbook.headline: Address the 90-minute policy in public responses
playbook.action: The seating limit is the only recurring negative theme across 106 reviews — one pinned response acknowledging it and explaining the format would neutralize the friction before it compounds.
